layout.sidebar: w-72 or w-80 border-r border-[#E5E5E5] flex flex-col h-full bg-[#FFFFFF]
layout.main_content: flex-1 relative flex flex-col h-full overflow-hidden bg-[#F2F2F2]
layout.spacing: Generous spacing. p-6 or p-8 for containers. gap-4 for list items.
layout.bento_grid: Not strictly applicable for fullscreen slideshow, but use 'Control Room' dense grid principles for the sidebar tree list.

components.buttons: Flat, sharp edges or minimal rounding (rounded-sm). Primary button: bg-[#002FA7] text-white hover:bg-[#002FA7]/90. Secondary: bg-white text-[#0A0A0A] border border-[#E5E5E5] hover:bg-[#F2F2F2].
components.inputs: Shadcn input with custom minimal styling. rounded-sm border-[#E5E5E5] focus:border-[#0A0A0A] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#0A0A0A].
components.slideshow_overlay: Brutalist label for folder names. Massive typography (Cabinet Grotesk text-6xl+). Placed centrally. Text color #FFFFFF with heavy text-shadow or a stark white solid box (bg-white) with black text for Swiss contrast.
components.controls: Glassmorphic (backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70) or solid white control bar fixed at the bottom center or overlaying the bottom. gap-6 items-center flex. Use 1px border (#E5E5E5).
components.progress_indicator: Thin sharp line at the top of the image container or screen, bg-[#0A0A0A] or bg-[#002FA7] h-1.
components.folder_tree: Dense layout in sidebar. Left-aligned text. Active folder highlighted with bg-[#F2F2F2] and text-[#0A0A0A].

motion.slideshow: Subtle scale-up (scale 1.05 to 1) and crossfade (opacity 0 to 1) for a cinematic high-end feel.
motion.hover: For buttons: slight background darkening. No heavy shadow lifts.

fallback_backgrounds.description: Black and white minimal wall texture for folder backgrounds lacking images
White paper texture for folder backgrounds

logos.description: Google G Logo for OAuth Button

instructions_to_main_agent: Load 'Cabinet Grotesk' for headings and 'IBM Plex Sans' for body using next/font, Fontshare, or standard imports.
Install Phosphor Icons: yarn add @phosphor-icons/react. Use it for all UI icons (play, pause, next, previous, folder, link).
Design Paradigm: Follow Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) exactly. Focus on stark minimalism, high-contrast borders, and avoiding decorative gradients. Use flat solid colors.
Dashboard Layout: Build a full-height layout with a sticky left sidebar (border-r border-[#E5E5E5]) containing the Google OAuth button, Drive Link Input Field, and the Folder Tree View.

Slideshow UI: The main viewing area must be immersive. Images should fill the container (object-cover). Overlay massive, tracking-tight typography (Cabinet Grotesk text-6xl+) for folder/subfolder names.
Fallback Image: If a folder has no photos to show, randomly select one of the `media.fallback_backgrounds` URLs as the background and display the folder name on top.
Controls: Place Manual Controls (Next/Previous) and Auto-play Toggle in a minimalist glassmorphic or solid panel anchored to the bottom. Add a sleek progress indicator bar fixed to the top edge.
Testing: Add explicit `data-testid` attributes to all interactive elements (login-button, drive-link-input, slideshow-next-button, etc).
